seed_patients.sql line 147-155 contains INSERT statement for patient Maria Santos
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh and verifier.py as prevention type for immunization task

FDA and Sanofi official sources confirm Fluzone Quadrivalent exists for 2024-2025 season; Sanofi shipped vaccines July 10, 2024 for 2024/25 flu season (https://www.news.sanofi.us/2024-07-10-Sanofi-ships-U-S-influenza-vaccines-for-the-2024-25-season)

Searched CDC Lot Number database, vaccine lot number guidance documents, and manufacturer specifications. The specific lot number 'UJ478AA' does not appear in any public CDC, FDA, or vaccine tracking databases. No search results returned any information about this specific lot number.
CDC and Immunize.org confirm IM is the standard route for Fluzone Quadrivalent administration (https://www.cdc.gov/flu/professionals/acip/app/dosage.htm)

Public Health Ontario and CDC confirm deltoid muscle as preferred IM injection site for vaccines in adults (https://www.publichealthontario.ca/-/media/Documents/nCoV/Vaccines/2021/07/immunization-technique-intramuscular-injections-deltoid.pdf, https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/administration/during.html)

FDA, CDC, and Sanofi official sources confirm Sanofi Pasteur Inc. manufactures Fluzone products (https://www.fda.gov/vaccines-blood-biologics/vaccines/fluzone-quadrivalent-fluzone-high-dose-quadrivalent-fluzone-intradermal-quadrivalent-fluzone)

CDC dosage guidance and Fluzone prescribing information confirm 0.5 mL as standard dose for individuals 36 months and older (https://www.cdc.gov/flu/professionals/acip/app/dosage.htm, https://www.drugs.com/pro/fluzone-quadrivalent.html)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves recording a flu vaccination for Maria Santos, a synthetic female patient (DOB 1994-04-27) in the OSCAR EMR system. The vaccine specified is Fluzone Quadrivalent 2024-2025, a real quadrivalent influenza vaccine manufactured by Sanofi Pasteur Inc. and confirmed available for the 2024-2025 flu season. The vaccination parameters are medically accurate: 0.5 mL dose administered intramuscularly in the left deltoid, which are standard and appropriate for adult influenza vaccination. The only unverifiable element is the specific lot number (UJ478AA), which does not appear in public CDC or FDA vaccine lot number databases and may be a synthetic test value.
